title: Non-Directional Jukebox
description: Remove the directional sound effect from a Jukebox.
body:
## Non-Directional Jukebox 🎵

![Requested on Fabric Discord server](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6c754afdd951744813900f76c42ec5609dd03f1.png)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/K3-sauorBwQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### 📜 Description
This mod  remove the directional effect from a Jukebox. However, please note that as a consequence, the attenuation volume effect is also removed, allowing the music to be heard from long distances.


### 🐛 Issues
- The record does not fade at distance sadly.
- If you have 'Directional Audio' enabled, you may notice that the sound comes from only one direction. In my case, the sound is louder on the left side.

### ❓ Support
If you encounter any issues or have questions about this mod, feel free to reach out to me on the Fabric Discord. You can ping `jokarwent` for direct assistance.

---
